scope: Small-batch recheck of unresolved 2026 Numata Bench Press Lot 1-100 research candidates after first-pass Lot coverage.

summary.reasonForNoPromotion: Official or high-trust rows either remain same-name-only, have unresolved same-person identity, or do not add a safe new source-linked achievement beyond existing candidate notes. No achievements were inferred.
